options.label: VLC HTTP URL
options.help: Enable VLC Web Interface in the desktop app. Use http://127.0.0.1:8080 for VLC on this PC.

options.label: VLC password
options.help: The password set in VLC Preferences > Main interfaces > Lua.

options.label: Optional preview stream
options.help: Optional browser-playable stream, such as HLS, MP4, or WebM.
